name: psmf-manager
description: Full-stack platform for managing Pharmacovigilance System Master Files — GxP-regulated software with audit trails, e-signing, and automated PSMF generation.
readmeSummary: Rails 7 JSON API with a React 19 + TypeScript SPA (Vite, TanStack Query, shadcn/ui), PostgreSQL with UUID keys, Sidekiq background jobs and ActionCable realtime — validated with Vitest, Minitest, Playwright and k6 suites.

name: office-to-pdf
description: FastAPI + LibreOffice microservice that converts Office documents to PDF and produces highlighted PDF comparisons.
readmeSummary: Dockerized conversion service (Ubuntu + LibreOffice) with an authenticated /convert endpoint for Word/Excel to PDF and a /compare endpoint for side-by-side or overlay PDF diffs, deployed on AWS ECS via ECR.

name: psmf-manager-website
description: Marketing site for PSMF Manager, built with Next.js + TypeScript.

name: pvcon-website
description: Company website for PVCON Consulting — Next.js + TypeScript.
